title: malus dulcissima var. subsessilis
intro: Malus dulcissima var. subsessilis is a lesser-known variety of the apple tree, scientifically classified as a type of deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Malus dulcissima var. subsessilis include potential anti-cancer properties, cardiovascular protection, and immune system support. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
